description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Sunday, January 11, 2026 (Reiwa 8), Hanno City held its Coming-of-Age Ceremony—Celebrating Twenty at Hanno City Civic Hall.

This year, 742 people in our city turned twenty. Of those, 467 attended the ceremony.

To all of you turning twenty and reaching this major milestone in life, and to your families: my heartfelt congratulations.

I sincerely wish that your futures will be filled with wonderful things to come.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202601/12981.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno City Coming-of-Age Ceremony 2026—Celebrating Twenty
